name: Pear Chutney
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces dried pear halves, chopped (2 cups)
1 large red onion, finely chopped (1 cup)
2 cups dark seedless and/or golden raisins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-quart saucepan, heat all ingredients and 1 cup water to boiling over high heat, stirring occasionally.
2. Reduce heat to low; simmer, uncovered, for 15 minutes or until pears are very soft, stirring frequently.
3. Discard cinnamon stick.
4. Spoon chutney into jars for gift giving.
5. Store in refrigerator for up to a month.
